[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100101 3
1 10011101 5
2 01011010 4
3 00100010 2
4 00111101 5
5 10010100 3
6 01101111 6
7 01010000 2

01 11111111 a

56 01111010 5
67 11101111 7
70 00010000 1
